name: AssignDataModel
description: Assigns the data model for Razor, making the template easier to build by populating various data properties like appTheme, moduleData, articleData, etc., from the SimplisityRazor model.

parameters.name: sModel
parameters.description: The SimplisityRazor model containing the data objects.

name: TextBoxMoney
description: Renders a textbox for currency input. The value is formatted according to the portal's currency settings.
signature: public IEncodedString TextBoxMoney(int portalId, string systemKey, string cultureCode, SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String attributes = "", String defaultValue = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "", string type = "text")

parameters.name: portalId
parameters.description: The ID of the portal.

parameters.name: systemKey
parameters.description: The system key for the catalog.

parameters.name: cultureCode
parameters.description: The culture code for currency formatting.

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the numeric money value.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default value if the field is empty.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The input type (default is 'text').

name: InterfaceNameResourceKey
description: Gets the localized name for a RocketInterface from the resource files. It searches in the system's resources first, then the interface's template resources.
signature: public IEncodedString InterfaceNameResourceKey(RocketInterface rocketInterface, SystemLimpet systemData, String lang = "", string resxFileName = "SideMenu")

parameters.name: rocketInterface
parameters.description: The interface object.

parameters.name: systemData
parameters.description: The system data object.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

parameters.name: resxFileName
parameters.description: The name of the resource file (default is 'SideMenu').

name: FilterGroupCheckBox
description: Renders a checkbox for a property group filter, typically used in theme settings to enable or disable filter groups.
signature: public IEncodedString FilterGroupCheckBox(SimplisityInfo info, string groupId, string textName)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The settings data model.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The ID of the property group.

parameters.name: textName
parameters.description: The display name for the checkbox.

name: FilterCheckBox
description: Renders a filter checkbox for the public-facing view. When changed, it updates a session field and triggers a JavaScript function to refresh the article list.
signature: public IEncodedString FilterCheckBox(string checkboxId, string textName, string sreturn, bool value, string cssClass = "", string attributes = "")

parameters.name: checkboxId
parameters.description: The unique ID for the checkbox.

parameters.name: textName
parameters.description: The display name for the filter.

parameters.name: sreturn
parameters.description: The jQuery selector for the container to be updated with the new list.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The initial checked state.

parameters.name: cssClass
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes.

name: FilterJsApiCall
description: Renders the JavaScript function 'callFilterArticleList' which calls the remote API to refresh the list of articles based on the current filter selections.
signature: public IEncodedString FilterJsApiCall(ModuleContentLimpet moduleData, SessionParams sessionParams, string templateName = "articlelist.cshtml")

parameters.name: moduleData
parameters.description: The module settings data.

parameters.name: sessionParams
parameters.description: The current session parameters.

parameters.name: templateName
parameters.description: The name of the template to render for the list.

name: FilterClearButton
description: Renders a button that clears all active filters by unchecking all filter checkboxes and refreshing the article list.
signature: public IEncodedString FilterClearButton(string textName, string sreturn)

parameters.name: textName
parameters.description: The text to display on the button.

parameters.name: sreturn
parameters.description: The jQuery selector for the container to be updated.

name: TagButtonClear
description: Renders a button to clear the active tag filter. It is initially hidden and appears when a tag is selected.
signature: public IEncodedString TagButtonClear(string textName, SessionParams sessionParams, string displayClass = "rocket-tagbutton")

parameters.name: textName
parameters.description: The text for the clear button.

parameters.name: sessionParams
parameters.description: The current session parameters.

parameters.name: displayClass
parameters.description: The base CSS class for the button.

name: TagButton
description: Renders a clickable tag button. When clicked, it sets the 'rocketpropertyidtag' session field and refreshes the article list to show items with that tag.
signature: public IEncodedString TagButton(int propertyid, string textName, SessionParams sessionParams, string displayClass = "rocket-tagbutton", string selectedClass = "rocket-tagbuttonOn")

parameters.name: propertyid
parameters.description: The ID of the property representing the tag.

parameters.name: textName
parameters.description: The display name of the tag.

parameters.name: sessionParams
parameters.description: The current session parameters.

parameters.name: displayClass
parameters.description: The base CSS class for the button.

parameters.name: selectedClass
parameters.description: The CSS class applied when the tag is selected.

name: TagJsApiCall
description: Renders the JavaScript function 'callTagArticleList' which calls the remote API to refresh the list of articles based on the selected tag.
signature: public IEncodedString TagJsApiCall(ModuleContentLimpet moduleData, string sreturn, SessionParams sessionParams, string templateName = "articlelist.cshtml")

parameters.name: moduleData
parameters.description: The module settings data.

parameters.name: sreturn
parameters.description: The jQuery selector for the container to be updated.

parameters.name: sessionParams
parameters.description: The current session parameters.

parameters.name: templateName
parameters.description: The name of the template to render for the list.

name: DateJsApiCall
description: Renders the JavaScript function 'doDateSearchReload' which calls the remote API to refresh the list of articles based on a selected date range.
signature: public IEncodedString DateJsApiCall(ModuleContentLimpet moduleData, string sreturn, SessionParams sessionParams, string templateName = "articlelist.cshtml")

parameters.name: moduleData
parameters.description: The module settings data.

parameters.name: sreturn
parameters.description: The jQuery selector for the container to be updated.

parameters.name: sessionParams
parameters.description: The current session parameters.

parameters.name: templateName
parameters.description: The name of the template to render for the list.

name: ListUrl
description: Builds a friendly URL to a list page, optionally including category information.
signature: public IEncodedString ListUrl(int listpageid, CategoryLimpet categoryData, string[] urlparams = null)

parameters.name: listpageid
parameters.description: The Tab ID of the list page.

parameters.name: categoryData
parameters.description: The category data to include in the URL.

parameters.name: urlparams
parameters.description: Optional additional URL parameters.

name: DetailUrl
description: Builds a friendly URL to a detail page for a specific article, including the article title and ID for SEO and routing.
signature: public IEncodedString DetailUrl(int detailpageid, ArticleLimpet articleData, string[] urlparams = null)

parameters.name: detailpageid
parameters.description: The Tab ID of the detail page.

parameters.name: articleData
parameters.description: The article data, containing the title and ID.

parameters.name: urlparams
parameters.description: Optional additional URL parameters.

name: RssUrl
description: Generates a URL for an RSS feed based on a command, date range, and optional SQL index.
signature: public IEncodedString RssUrl(int portalId, string cmd, int yearDate, int monthDate, int numberOfMonths = 1, string sqlidx = "")

parameters.name: portalId
parameters.description: The ID of the portal.

parameters.name: cmd
parameters.description: The command for the RSS feed action.

parameters.name: yearDate
parameters.description: The starting year.

parameters.name: monthDate
parameters.description: The starting month.

parameters.name: numberOfMonths
parameters.description: The number of months to include in the feed.

parameters.name: sqlidx
parameters.description: Optional SQL index identifier.

name: ChatGPT
description: Renders a button to open a ChatGPT modal for generating text. Requires a ChatGPT API key in the global settings. The generated text will populate the field specified by 'textId'.
signature: public IEncodedString ChatGPT(string textId, string sourceTextId = "")

parameters.name: textId
parameters.description: The ID of the target HTML element to populate with the response.

parameters.name: sourceTextId
parameters.description: Optional. The ID of an element whose value will be used as the initial prompt.

name: DeepL
description: Renders a button to open a DeepL translation modal. Requires a DeepL API key in the global settings and more than one portal language to be enabled. The translated text will populate the field specified by 'textId'.
signature: public IEncodedString DeepL(string textId, string sourceTextId = "", string cultureCode = "")

parameters.name: textId
parameters.description: The ID of the target HTML element to populate with the translated text.

parameters.name: sourceTextId
parameters.description: Optional. The ID of an element whose value will be used as the source text for translation.

parameters.name: cultureCode
parameters.description: Optional. The language code for the 'translate' resource string.
